summary_en: 20,000 shares acquired for ¥47.2M via ToSTNeT-3 on 27 May 2026. Program completion: 95.2% of authorized 21,000-share limit (0.75% S/O) consumed; ¥47.2M of ¥60M budget deployed (78.7%). Replenishment for restricted-stock awards and capital-efficiency enhancement.
title_en: Notice of Acquisition Results and Completion of Repurchase of Treasury Shares via Off-Hours Trading Transaction (ToSTNeT-3)
translation_en_brief: Koryojyuhan Co., Ltd. announced on 27 May 2026 the completion of a treasury stock repurchase program authorized by board resolution on 26 May 2026. The company acquired 20,000 shares (0.71% of shares outstanding) for ¥47.2M via ToSTNeT-3 off-hours trading on 27 May 2026. This represents 95.2% consumption of the authorized limit of 21,000 shares and 78.7% utilization of the ¥60M budget ceiling. The repurchase was executed to secure shares for allocation under the company's restricted-stock compensation plan in future periods, and to enable flexible capital allocation in response to evolving business conditions while enhancing capital efficiency.
